title: Run deliverability E2E and permission gate
goal: Run the broadest necessary product/runtime verification after implementation slices, fix only verified defects in allowed windows, and decide deliverable readiness.
allowed_files: Only source files needed to fix defects found by assigned E2E/product verification
forbidden_scope: No silent skipping of failed E2E paths.
No claiming readiness from type-check/build alone.
acceptance: Current identifiable backlog is empty or reduced to explicit external blockers.
All completed slices have logs, review results, and docs sync.
Final risk list is concrete and dated.
Final answer gives direct deliverable/not-deliverable judgment.
verification_commands: E2E-style product/runtime verification chosen from actual app surfaces.
Focused reruns after any defect fix.
review_gate: Final release-readiness review with findings first and explicit residual risk list.
